dailyNews.description: The shipping ministry has issued a standard operating procedure for handling all vessels loaded with shipments bound for West Asian ports.

dailyNews.title: Team USA's World Baseball Classic hopes take massive hit with Italy upset
dailyNews.description: Team USA suffered a massive 8-6 upset at the hands of Italy on Tuesday night, dampening their World Baseball Classic quarterfinal hopes.

dailyNews.title: Beloved 75-year-old math teacher found dead inside Baltimore elementary school
dailyNews.description: A 75-year-old Maryland math teacher who died over the weekend was discovered inside her Baltimore elementary school, with police saying there were no signs of foul play.

dailyNews.title: Miami Heat star Bam Adebayo makes NBA history with 83-point game
dailyNews.description: Bam Adebayo scored 83 points in Miami Heat's 150-129 victory over the Washington Wizards, recording the second-highest scoring game in NBA history behind Wilt Chamberlain.

dailyNews.title: FBI arrests alleged MS-13 member accused in El Salvador pastor’s killing
dailyNews.description: A suspected MS-13 gang member was arrested by the FBI in Connecticut for allegedly killing a pastor in El Salvador. He was then turned over to ICE.

topStories.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
topStories.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

topStories.title: Trump Administration to Restart Global Entry Program
topStories.description: The program for people traveling internationally, set to come back online at 5 a.m. Wednesday, had been paused amid the shutdown of the Homeland Security Department.

topStories.title: Voting Company Smartmatic Says It’s a Target of Vindictive Prosecution by Trump
topStories.description: The voting technology company’s new court filing signals how far-reaching the legal fights over elections will be in 2026.

topStories.title: Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris Advance to Runoff in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Georgia District
topStories.description: Clayton Fuller will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in an April runoff. Mr. Fuller’s win over a flashier Republican showed the power of the president’s support.

topStories.title: Pentagon says about 140 U.S. service members wounded since Iran war began
topStories.description: President Trump says the Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let oil leave the Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will build first refinery in 50 years with investment from India's Reliance Industries
dailyNews.description: U.S. President said India's largest private energy company Reliance Industries is investing in a $300-billion refinery project in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Anduril expands into space as defense tech angles to support Trump's Golden Dome
dailyNews.description: Anduril, founded by Oculus creator Palmer Luckey, is positioning itself to be a key player in President Trump's "Golden Dome" project.

dailyNews.title: Tillis maintains blockade on Fed pick Kevin Warsh over Powell probe

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
